case_title: GAO CUIFENG VS. PACE SUPPLY CORP.

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF OR DEFENDANT. PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AT THE LAST HEARING AND IF NO APPEARANCES AT THIS HEARING, MATTER TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETLLED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-15-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-04-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF GAO CUIFENG IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY CERTIFIED MANDARIN COURT INTERPRETER AIDONG NI #301135. DEFENDANT PACE SUPPLY CORP. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY PAUL HEINTZ, DIRECTOR OF OPERATIONS. PARTIES HAVE AGREED TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AMONGST THEMSELVES. NO APPEARANCES ARE REQUIRED AT THE APRIL HEARING IF SETTLEMENT TERMS HAVE BEEN HONORED. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE APRIL HEARING DATE, MATTER TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
